headline: 痴迷领跑热搜，福尔摩斯小姐3受瞩目
headlineEn: Obsession Leads Trending, Enola Holmes 3 Draws Attention
summary: 今日娱乐新闻：无新片上映，本周新片1部。热搜榜由《痴迷》领跑，《末日地堡》《福尔摩斯小姐3》紧随其后；行业聚焦《穿普拉达的女王2》等新动态。
summaryEn: Today's entertainment news: No new releases today, 1 new movie this week. Trending top is 'Obsession', followed by 'Silo' and 'Enola Holmes 3'; industry highlights include 'The Devil Wears Prada 2' and more.

industryHighlights.text: 《穿普拉达的女王2》本周热搜持续升温
industryHighlights.en: 'The Devil Wears Prada 2' continues to heat up this week's trending

industryHighlights.text: 《小黄人与大怪兽》跻身本周前五
industryHighlights.en: 'Minions and the Big Monster' enters top five this week

industryHighlights.text: 《安昂传奇：最后的气宗》等新片预告引期待
industryHighlights.en: Upcoming films like 'Avatar: The Last Airbender' generate anticipation
